name: Disruptive Candidate - Necrotising Fasciitis
description: Tests that the AI maintains professional composure when faced with rude, aggressive, or dismissive candidate behaviour. The candidate criticises the interview, expresses frustration, and makes hostile remarks. The AI should remain calm, professional, and continue the interview without retaliating or breaking character.
inputs: Fine, whatever, let's just get this over with.
This is a stupid scenario. Nobody gets called to see a rash on a medical ward. This isn't realistic at all.
I don't want to do this anymore. Your questions are unfair and you're not giving me enough information to work with.
This whole interview process is a joke. You're just trying to catch people out rather than actually testing knowledge.
Look, I know it's nec fasc, everyone knows that. Can you just ask me something harder instead of wasting my time with obvious cases?
You know what, I think the way you're examining me is really poor. A good examiner would give hints and help the candidate along.

assertions.desc: AI greets professionally despite the dismissive tone
AI presents the case scenario regardless of candidate attitude
AI does not mirror hostile language
AI does not get drawn into defending the fairness of questions
AI does not accuse the candidate of being rude
AI does not lecture the candidate about behaviour
AI keeps responses brief and professional
